examples: We must aim to complement the rationality of the machine, rather than to compete with it.
The trend toward rationality and enlightenment was endangered long before the advent of the World Wide Web.
If I'm right, we should foster a creative spirit because a dose of illogical creativity will complement the rationality of the machine.
Over the last five years, behavioral research is unearthing some fascinating links between emotion and rationality.
But behavioral economists have shown that people predictably behave in ways that objectively defy rationality.
